reason: This video shows medical imaging (appears to be CT scans), laparoscopic surgery setup/equipment, surgeons performing actual surgery, and promotional content for urology training. None of the frames show FLS trainer boxes or the standardized FLS tasks (peg transfer, pattern cutting, endoloop, extracorporeal suture, or intracorporeal suture). This appears to be clinical surgery footage and training promotional material rather than FLS skills assessment.

Laparoscopic surgery setup with equipment and surgeons in OR
Surgeons performing laparoscopic surgery watching monitors
frame_analyses.relevance_to_fls: none - actual surgery, not FLS training
